description_long: This object is a slender, elongated knife or short sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a fine point. The blade appears to be forged from a dark metallic material, with a subtle sheen and a slightly uneven surface texture, suggesting handcrafting or age. The handle is integrated into the blade, with a slight bulge at the end, possibly serving as a basic pommel for grip security. There is no visible crossguard or elaborate ornamentation, giving the object a utilitarian and minimalist appearance. The coloration is predominantly dark brown to black, with some lighter highlights along the edges. The overall form is simple and functional, suitable for precise cutting or thrusting tasks.
description: A slender, straight-bladed knife or short sword with a dark, metallic finish and a simple, integrated handle. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, lacking ornamentation or a guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade and handle, highlighting the straight profile and slight bulge at the handle end.
description_view_1: Edge-on view revealing the thinness of the blade and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the straight blade and handle with minimal surface detail.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slim, linear form of the object.
attribute_handle_design: straight, integrated, slight bulge at end, dark finish
